title: Several Israeli strikes hit south Lebanon: state media

snapshot.title: Several Israeli strikes hit south Lebanon: state media
snapshot.description: BEIRUT: Israeli forces on Wednesday carried out airstrikes on several areas in south Lebanon, state media reported, despite a peace deal in the Middle East war that includes Lebanon. Lebanon’s National News Agency said Israeli warplanes launched raids targeting the Nabatieh Al-Fawqa area and the eastern outskirts of neighboring town Kfar Tebnit. The Israelis also launched a
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Several Israeli strikes hit south Lebanon: state media | Arab News
